scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:e2e: cross-env DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///e2e.sqlite JWT_SECRET=e2e-jwt-secret-min-32-characters-long-xx CORS_ORIGINS=http://127.0.0.1:5173 AUTO_CREATE_TABLES=1 concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:be:e2e: cross-env DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///e2e.sqlite JWT_SECRET=e2e-jwt-secret-min-32-characters-long-xx CORS_ORIGINS=http://127.0.0.1:5173 AUTO_CREATE_TABLES=1 npm run dev --prefix backend
